title: Slack screenshot: #launch-room
text: Alex: July 8 still feels possible if QA closes by Friday. Mina: treat July 8 as a proposal, not committed.

title: Launch readiness meeting
text: Decision: move external launch to July 15. Owners agreed to announce internally after security sign-off.

title: Launch plan draft
text: The previous July 8 date is superseded. Current launch date: July 15, pending no P0 security findings.

title: Calendar screenshot
text: Hold: July 22 contingency review. This is a backup slot, not the launch date.
